# React Portfolio Website - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
React-based portfolio website that dynamically populates content from a JSON resume data file.

## Project Structure
```
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── Header.jsx
│   │   ├── Hero.jsx
│   │   ├── About.jsx
│   │   ├── Skills.jsx
│   │   ├── Experience.jsx
│   │   ├── Education.jsx
│   │   ├── Projects.jsx
│   │   └── Contact.jsx
│   ├── data/
│   │   └── resume.json
│   ├── styles/
│   │   └── App.css
│   ├── App.jsx
│   └── main.jsx
├── package.json
└── README.md
```

## Key Features
- Dynamic content loading from JSON file
- Responsive layout
- Component-based architecture
- Easy to customize resume data

## Development Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build
